channel.title: Business News - Markets reports and financial news from Sky

image.title: Business News - Markets reports and financial news from Sky

channel.description: Sky business news provides up to the minute reports on markets, share prices and the world economy, alongside expert business commentary.
channel.copyright: Copyright 2026, Sky UK. All Rights Reserved.

item.title: Thames Water rescue in peril as government opposes 'weak' deal
item.description: Cash-strapped Thames Water is again facing down the prospect of being placed in temporary public ownership after the government raised objections to a proposed £10bn rescue by its lenders.
item.media:description: Ministers have lined up insolvency practitioners to prepare for the potential collapse of Thames Water, Britain's biggest water utility.

item.title: Former Microsoft chief Barclay joins British fintech unicorn Zilch
item.description: One of Britain's leading fintech unicorns will this week name Microsoft's former UK boss to its board as it continues to seek acquisition targets ahead of an eventual public listing.

item.title: Burberry kept in check over boss's pay deal | Mark Kleinman blog
item.media:description: The logo of Burberry is seen in Shinjuku, Tokyo. Pic: AP

item.title: How threat of social media ban jolted tech giants into action
item.description: Roblox has revealed new safety measures, just as the government announces it will ban under-16s from social media and potentially some gaming platforms… like Roblox.
item.media:description: A child uses Roblox. File pic: iStock

item.title: Oil prices drop and stocks enjoy cautious rally on US-Iran peace progress
item.description: There is cautious optimism on financial markets that a US-Iran peace deal will ease the hit to the global economy caused by their war.
item.media:description: Tugboats guide the crude oil tanker Odessa, carrying UAE crude after passing through the Strait of Hormuz with its Automatic Identification System transponder turned off, navigates the waters at Daesan port, where it is expected to discharge crude oil, in Seosan, South Korea, May 8, 2026. REUTERS/Kim Soo-hyeon

item.title: Fox to buy Roku for $22bn
item.description: Fox has agreed a takeover of Roku in a deal worth $22bn (£16.4bn).
item.media:description: A Roku smart TV. Pic: AP

item.title: Stuff Matters... because boring stuff is often actually tremendously interesting
item.description: How did the light-emitting diode change the world? And, come to mention it, might it perversely actually prompt us to puff more carbon dioxide into the atmosphere?
item.media:description: Ed Conway's new podcast uncovers the "hidden global forces behind everyday objects"

item.title: Why you shouldn't pay for passport photos | Money newsletter
item.description: More than 200,000 people have now signed up to our free Money newsletter, which brings the kind of content you enjoy in the award-winning Money blog directly to your inbox every week.
item.media:description: Shot of young smiling coworkers showing instant photos and having fun in their free time in the office. Pic: iStock

item.title: 'I sell ice cream - here are the secrets of our prices and how often I treat myself'
item.description: If you've ever spent your morning commute daydreaming about starting afresh with your career, this feature is for you. Each Monday, we speak to someone from a different profession to discover what it's really like. Today we speak to private ambulance worker-turned-ice cream man James Shemmeld...
item.media:description: Ice cream man James Shemmeld. For Money blog, no credit needed

item.title: Paramount takeover of Warner Bros 'won't harm competition or consumers'
item.description: A US Department of Justice (DOJ) investigation into the proposed Paramount Skydance acquisition of Warner Bros Discovery (WBD) has determined the merger is not likely to harm competition in the industry or be harmful to consumers.
